panels.title: ♾️ Milestones
panels.infobox: ♾️ Endless Mode unlocks after getting at least 1 ending with *each* character. Play through the story endings first, then dive in. Endless Mode is longer than all 10 prior runs combined.

entry_Goal.name: Pay 1,000,000 silver
entry_Goal.reward: Unlocks Fancy Dress. 'Completes' Endless Mode (keep playing)

entry_Goal.name: Buy + sell a Fancy Dress
entry_Goal.reward: Only if you've sold all other goods at least once

entry_Goal.name: Save, then main menu → Options → Replay Scenes → Misc → Extra Spicey and Wolf
entry_Goal.reward: Save before doing this so you can reload

entry_Goal.name: Reload, grind to 9,999,999 silver
entry_Goal.reward: 8+ hours of grinding. The reward cutscene is... brief.
